review_metadata.scope: tests/test_tools/ (9 files, 5,389 LOC) + tests/integration/ (8 files, 4,619 LOC)

critical_issues.title: SQL Injection Test Bypasses
critical_issues.description: SQL injection tests miss advanced obfuscation techniques including comment-based bypasses, time-based blind injection, and error-based extraction
critical_issues.impact: Production vulnerability if LLM generates obfuscated SQL injection payloads
missing_test_cases: admin' UNION SELECT NULL,NULL,table_name FROM information_schema.tables--
critical_issues.recommendation: Add comprehensive OWASP SQL injection test suite covering all major injection techniques

critical_issues.title: Race Condition in Rate Limiter
critical_issues.description: Rate limiter tests only verify sequential execution, not thread-safety under concurrent access
critical_issues.impact: Race condition could allow rate limit bypass when multiple threads execute simultaneously
critical_issues.current_gap: Sequential test at line 821-853 doesn't verify concurrent safety
critical_issues.required_test: Concurrent stress test with 50+ threads hitting rate limiter simultaneously
critical_issues.recommendation: Add concurrent rate limiter stress tests verifying thread-safe enforcement

high_priority_issues.title: Incomplete Timeout Tests
high_priority_issues.description: Timeout tests don't verify edge cases like infinite loops, I/O blocks, or critical section locks
missing_scenarios: Tool with infinite loop (not just sleep)
Tool blocked on I/O (file lock, network wait)
Multiple consecutive timeouts causing thread pool exhaustion
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Add comprehensive timeout edge case suite testing non-sleep blocking scenarios

high_priority_issues.title: Missing Error Recovery Tests
high_priority_issues.description: No dedicated tests for error recovery scenarios after tool exceptions
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Add comprehensive error recovery test class

high_priority_issues.title: Weak Assertion Quality
high_priority_issues.description: Many tests use generic assertions that don't verify specific expected behavior

examples.issue: Generic assertion - doesn't verify specific behavior
examples.should_be: assert result.result == 10000 OR 'too long' in result.error.lower()

examples.issue: Should verify specific unsupported type mentioned in error

high_priority_issues.recommendation: Replace generic assertions with specific expected values

high_priority_issues.title: Test Independence Violations
high_priority_issues.description: RateLimiter tests may share state if rate limiter has global state
high_priority_issues.issue: Tests create new RateLimiter instances but don't isolate state
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Add fixtures to ensure test independence and prevent state leakage

high_priority_issues.title: Missing Performance Tests
high_priority_issues.description: No performance/benchmark tests to establish baseline and catch regressions

high_priority_issues.title: Flaky Test Risk
high_priority_issues.description: Time-based tests may be flaky on slow CI/CD systems

flaky_tests.name: test_allows_requests_after_window
flaky_tests.issue: time.sleep(1.1) may fail on slow systems

high_priority_issues.recommendation: Increase timing margins (1.1s → 1.5s), add retry logic, use pytest-timeout

high_priority_issues.title: Missing Rollback Integration Tests
high_priority_issues.description: Rollback tests focus on RollbackManager in isolation, missing ToolExecutor integration
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Expand rollback integration test coverage with executor integration

high_priority_issues.title: Insufficient Security Test Vectors
high_priority_issues.description: Security tests miss OWASP Top 10 attack vectors beyond path traversal, command injection, SQL injection
high_priority_issues.recommendation: Add comprehensive OWASP attack vector test suite

medium_priority_issues.title: Test Data Quality - Unrealistic Scenarios
medium_priority_issues.description: Tests use trivial examples (2 + 3) instead of realistic LLM-generated expressions
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Add realistic scenario tests based on actual LLM usage patterns

medium_priority_issues.title: Missing Negative Tests
medium_priority_issues.description: Tests focus on happy path, insufficient negative testing (None, invalid metadata, concurrent registration)

medium_priority_issues.title: Mocking Strategy - Over-Mocking
medium_priority_issues.description: Integration tests mock too much (entire LLM), reducing integration value
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Mock at HTTP/service level, not interface level for true integration testing

medium_priority_issues.title: Setup/Teardown Leaks
medium_priority_issues.description: Inconsistent cleanup patterns - some use fixtures, others manual teardown
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Standardize on fixture-based cleanup for guaranteed cleanup

medium_priority_issues.title: Test Naming Inconsistency
medium_priority_issues.description: Inconsistent test naming conventions across files

medium_priority_issues.title: Insufficient Boundary Value Testing
medium_priority_issues.description: Missing systematic boundary testing (min, min+1, max-1, max)
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Add boundary value tests for all integer/range parameters

medium_priority_issues.title: Missing Unicode/Encoding Edge Cases
medium_priority_issues.description: Only basic Unicode test, missing normalization, combining characters, RTL text
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Add comprehensive Unicode edge case tests

medium_priority_issues.title: No Tests for Concurrent Tool Registration
medium_priority_issues.description: No tests verifying thread-safe tool registration during concurrent access

medium_priority_issues.title: Missing Tests for Tool Versioning Conflicts
medium_priority_issues.description: Versioning tests don't cover semantic version conflict resolution edge cases
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Add comprehensive version conflict resolution tests

medium_priority_issues.title: Incomplete Error Message Validation
medium_priority_issues.description: Tests check for error presence but not specific content/format
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Verify exact error messages match expected format

medium_priority_issues.title: Missing Tests for Parameter Default Values
medium_priority_issues.description: No tests verifying parameter default values are applied correctly

medium_priority_issues.title: No Tests for Metadata Validation
medium_priority_issues.description: No tests verifying metadata validation (required fields, formats)

missing_areas: Edge cases in validate_params() with Pydantic models
Some SSRF edge cases (IPv6 edge cases)

flaky_tests.name: test_allows_requests_after_window
flaky_tests.reason: May fail on slow CI/CD systems

flaky_tests.name: test_concurrent_execution_tracking
flaky_tests.reason: Race condition if threads not started

tasks: Fix SQL injection test gaps (C1) - 8 hours
Add concurrent rate limiter tests (C2) - 6 hours
Add URL-encoded path traversal tests - 4 hours
Add OWASP attack vector tests (H8) - 16 hours

initiatives: Automated test generation for new tools
